Container.Name: geometrikks
Container.Overview:
GeoMetrikks is a real-time geolocation analytics tool that tails your nginx access logs, performs GeoIP lookups, and visualizes traffic on a live interactive map - no external services required.
Features: - Live GeoIP map with real-time request visualization - Traffic analytics dashboard with configurable date ranges - Searchable access log history with filtering and sorting - WebSocket-backed live log tail - Batch import of archived logs
Requires a TimescaleDB + PostGIS database - install the companion "geometrikks-timescaledb" template from this same repository first, or point this container at your own TimescaleDB+PostGIS instance. Also requires a free MaxMind GeoLite2 account for GeoIP data (https://www.maxmind.com/en/geolite2/signup). See the repository README for full setup steps.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: nginx geoip analytics traffic map log parser timescaledb

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: HTTP port for the GeoMetrikks web UI.

Config.Name: GeoIP Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the downloaded MaxMind GeoLite2 database. This container runs as fixed UID/GID 1000 (not Unraid's usual nobody:users 99:100) - before first start, create this folder and run 'chown -R 1000:1000' on it or the container will fail to write the GeoIP database.

Config.Name: Nginx Logs
Config.Description: Host directory containing your nginx access logs, mounted read-only. Default assumes SWAG - change to your reverse proxy's log directory (Nginx Proxy Manager, etc.).

Config.Name: APP_ADMIN_USER
Config.Description: Web UI login username.

Config.Name: APP_ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Web UI login password. Required unless APP_AUTH_DISABLED=true.

Config.Name: APP_AUTH_DISABLED
Config.Description: Set true ONLY if this container sits behind an authenticating reverse proxy (Authelia, Tailscale, etc).

Config.Name: MAXMINDDB_USER_ID
Config.Description: MaxMind account ID, for GeoLite2 database auto-download. Free account: https://www.maxmind.com/en/geolite2/signup

Config.Name: MAXMINDDB_LICENSE_KEY
Config.Description: MaxMind license key, for GeoLite2 database auto-download.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_LOG_PATHS
Config.Description: Nginx access log file(s) to tail, container-side path(s). Single path or a JSON list ['/var/log/nginx/access.log', '/var/log/nginx/access2.log'] for multiple files.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_HOST_NAME
Config.Description: Hostname label attached to ingested log events.

Config.Name: DB_HOST
Config.Description: IP address of your TimescaleDB container - typically your Unraid server's IP if you installed the companion geometrikks-timescaledb template.

Config.Name: DB_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Database password. Must match POSTGRES_PASSWORD in the geometrikks-timescaledb template.

Config.Name: DB_PORT
Config.Description: Database port.

Config.Name: DB_USER
Config.Description: Database user. Must match POSTGRES_USER in the geometrikks-timescaledb template.

Config.Name: DB_DATABASE
Config.Description: Database name. Must match POSTGRES_DB in the geometrikks-timescaledb template.

Config.Name: API_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Application log verbosity (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

Config.Name: DB_ECHO
Config.Description: Enable SQLAlchemy query logging.

Config.Name: DB_ECHO_POOL
Config.Description: Enable SQLAlchemy connection pool logging.

Config.Name: DB_MAX_OVERFLOW
Config.Description: Max connections above pool_size.

Config.Name: DB_POOL_SIZE
Config.Description: Database connection pool size.

Config.Name: DB_POOL_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Connection pool timeout in seconds.

Config.Name: DB_POOL_RECYCLE
Config.Description: Connection recycle time in seconds.

Config.Name: DB_POOL_DISABLED
Config.Description: Disable connection pooling.

Config.Name: DB_POOL_PRE_PING
Config.Description: Enable pool pre-ping to check connections before use.

Config.Name: DB_DROP_ON_STARTUP
Config.Description: DESTRUCTIVE - drops all tables on startup. Development only. Leave false.

Config.Name: GEOIP_LOCALES
Config.Description: JSON list of GeoIP locales to use.

Config.Name: GEOIP_VALIDATE_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Fail settings validation when the GeoIP database file is missing.

Config.Name: GEOIP_VALIDATE_LOCALES
Config.Description: Validate that the specified GeoIP locales are supported.

Config.Name: GEOIP_REFRESH_DAYS
Config.Description: Re-download the GeoLite2 database when older than this many days.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_POLL_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Interval in seconds to poll the log file for new entries.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_SEND_LOGS
Config.Description: Send parsed logs to the database.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_BATCH_SIZE
Config.Description: Max records before a forced commit.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_COMMIT_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Max time interval in seconds between database commits.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_SKIP_VALIDATION
Config.Description: Skip validation of log lines.

Config.Name: LOGPARSER_STORE_DEBUG_LINES
Config.Description: Store all raw log lines in the debug table, not just malformed ones.

Config.Name: ANALYTICS_RAW_RETENTION_DAYS
Config.Description: Days to keep raw geo_events and access_logs data.

Config.Name: ANALYTICS_DEBUG_RETENTION_DAYS
Config.Description: Days to keep access_log_debug data.

Config.Name: ANALYTICS_HOURLY_RETENTION_DAYS
Config.Description: Days to keep hourly continuous aggregate data.

Config.Name: ANALYTICS_CAGG_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MINUTES
Config.Description: Minutes between continuous aggregate refreshes.

Config.Name: ANALYTICS_COMPRESSION_AFTER_DAYS
Config.Description: Days after which to compress hypertable chunks.

Config.Name: SCHEDULER_ENABLED
Config.Description: Enable scheduled background tasks.

Config.Name: SCHEDULER_LOCATION_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MINUTES
Config.Description: Minutes between GeoLocation.last_hit refresh jobs.

Config.Name: MAP_HOME_LATITUDE
Config.Description: Optional destination latitude for live request routes. Set both home coordinates to override external-IP auto-detection.

Config.Name: MAP_HOME_LONGITUDE
Config.Description: Optional destination longitude for live request routes.

Config.Name: MAP_AUTO_DETECT_HOME
Config.Description: Resolve the server's public IP at startup and geolocate it when home coordinates are unset.

Config.Name: MAP_PUBLIC_IP_URL
Config.Description: JSON endpoint used for public-IP discovery; response must contain an 'ip' field.

Config.Name: MAP_PUBLIC_IP_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Timeout in seconds for public-IP discovery.

Config.Name: APP_NAME
Config.Description: Application name shown in API metadata.

Config.Name: APP_DESCRIPTION
Config.Default: Real-time GeoIP lookups and traffic analytics API
Config.Description: Application description shown in API metadata.

Config.Name: APP_DEBUG
Config.Description: Enable debug mode. Development only.

Config.Name: APP_ENVIRONMENT
Config.Description: Application environment name.
